title: Next.js Server Actions SSRF via Host header in app-relative redirect
description: createRedirectRenderResult builds an internal fetch URL from the inbound request Host header (originalHost.value) when handling an app-relative redirect for a Server Action. Because the Host header is attacker-controlled, a Server Action that redirects to an internal path causes the server to issue an outbound fetch to a URL composed from the attacker's host value, allowing SSRF against arbitrary destinations.
